title: Phase B: extract lib/ (colors, num, geometry, icons, styles) from App.jsx
action: Extract the pure foundation layer out of src/App.jsx into src/lib/ (per D4), a move-only refactor. Create: (a) src/lib/colors.js exporting `C` (App.jsx:51-54); (b) src/lib/num.js exporting gcd, simplify, decToFrac, nearestFrac, parseNum, decimalInfo (App.jsx:57-95) — keep their internal cross-calls intact; (c) src/lib/geometry.js exporting RAD, P, arc (App.jsx:97-104); (d) src/lib/icons.js exporting the `ICON` map (App.jsx:255) with its own `import { Activity, Hash, RefreshCw, MoveHorizontal, Scale, Trophy, Plus, BookOpen, Globe, HelpCircle } from 'lucide-react'`; (e) src/lib/styles.js exporting inputBox, btnPrimary, btnGhost (App.jsx:252-254) with `import { C } from './colors.js'`. Then in src/App.jsx: DELETE those inline definitions and add imports at the top (`import { C } from './lib/colors.js'`, `import { gcd, simplify, decToFrac, nearestFrac, parseNum, decimalInfo } from './lib/num.js'`, `import { RAD, P, arc } from './lib/geometry.js'`, `import { ICON } from './lib/icons.js'`, `import { inputBox, btnPrimary, btnGhost } from './lib/styles.js'`). Every existing reference in App.jsx keeps its identical name, so all call sites keep working. Keep the App.jsx lucide-react import line for the icons still used directly there (Sparkles, Check, X, ArrowRight, Star, Target, Lightbulb, ChevronDown, Hand, MousePointerClick, Keyboard, List, etc.) — only remove a name from App.jsx's lucide import if it is now unused in App.jsx AND you have confirmed so by grep. Do NOT change any behavior, any lesson content (D2), or static/ (D1). Do NOT move UI components/blocks/data (that is Phases C-F). The smoke test and build are the regression gate.

truths: src/lib/ contains colors.js, num.js, geometry.js, icons.js, styles.js each exporting the named symbols
src/App.jsx imports those symbols instead of defining them inline; no duplicate inline definitions remain
npx vitest run stays green (all 15 lessons, >=100 stations) and npm run build stays clean
no import cycle (lib modules import only lucide-react and each other downward: styles->colors)

artifacts.substantive: exports the 6 number helpers with internal cross-calls intact
exports ICON map, imports its own lucide icons
exports inputBox, btnPrimary, btnGhost; imports C from ./colors.js

key_links: src/App.jsx imports every extracted symbol from src/lib/*
prohibitions: Do NOT change observable behavior or output
Do NOT alter lesson content (D2) or touch static/ (D1)
Do NOT move UI components, blocks, Figure, or lesson data (Phases C-F)

verify: npx vitest run && npm run build

trace.verify_output: npx vitest run: 1 passed (all 15 lessons, stations net green). npm run build: 1505 modules transformed (5 new src/lib files), built in 1.64s, bundle 296.26 kB gzip 93.51 (== baseline -> behavior preserved). No inline C/num/geometry/styles/ICON defs remain in App.jsx; imported from src/lib/*.
trace.verify_command: npx vitest run && npm run build
